caption: A person's hands are shown in a close-up, interacting with items on a surface decorated with a tropical palm tree motif. In the beginning, the person uses a small applicator to apply a substance to a white rectangular base. A small inset video shows a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sitting in a chair. The background features the logo "JASPYS" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the person picks up a baseball card and holds it up to the camera. The card features a player and the name "CLAYTON" is visible at the bottom. The inset video of the man remains consistent, showing him sitting in front of his equipment. Throughout the clip, the "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" branding remains prominently displayed in the upper portions of the frame.
